text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, is this today's training regimen? How
interesting...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Come now, enough with your games. This can't be
the real plan, can it?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I know you must still be hiding some magnificent
scheme that you sacrificed everything to develop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Well, it seems like I still have a ways to go!
